channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: How does abortion translate? Ballot measures are a challenge for interpreters
item.description: Reproductive rights measures are on the ballots in 10 states after heated debates over terminology and impact — and that’s just in English.
item.dc:creator: Michael Warren, Geoff Mulvihill And Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Oscar brings winds, heavy rains to eastern Cuba after striking the Bahamas
item.description: HAVANA (AP) — Tropical Storm Oscar brought heavy rains and winds to Cuba, an island already beleaguered by a massive power outage, late Sunday after brushing the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman goes missing in Maine forest for days, is rescued hundreds of feet from dead husband
item.description: Maine officials announced the rescue of Pamela Helmstadter on Thursday, who went missing with her husband John a few days earlier. John had died after suffering a fall.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thelma Mothershed Wair, a member of the Little Rock Nine who integrated an Arkansas school, has died
item.description: Thelma Mothershed Wair, one of the nine Black students who integrated a high school in Arkansas' capital city of Little Rock in 1957 while a mob of white segregationists yelled threats and insults, has died at age 83.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: President Biden and first lady toast a reimagined White House tour that she's unveiling on Monday
item.description: President Joe Biden and first lady Jill Biden on Sunday toasted the unveiling of a long-awaited reimagined public White House tour.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Browns QB Watson suffers likely season-ending Achilles injury. Teammates upset some fans cheered
item.description: Deshaun Watson's tumultuous tenure with Cleveland has taken another significant turn. His third season appears to be over.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2 Navy aviators declared dead after fighter jet crash
item.description: The aviators' names won’t be released until a day after their next of kin have been notified, the Navy said in a statement Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Republicans head to court in expanding battle about overseas ballots
item.description: Overseas voting has become the latest battlefront in Republicans’ legal challenges leading up to the election.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Orionid meteor shower peaks tonight: How to see it
item.description: The Orionids, which began in late September, are considered the most beautiful of the annual meteor showers.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Evans, NewsNation

item.title: 2 Navy aviators declared dead after fighter jet crash in Washington state
item.description: The aviators' names won’t be released until a day after their next of kin have been notified, the Navy said in a statement Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: One of the last Navajo Code Talkers from World War II dies at 107
item.description: WINDOW ROCK, Ariz. (AP) — John Kinsel Sr., one of the last remaining Navajo Code Talkers who transmitted messages during World War II based on the tribe's native language, has died. He was 107. Navajo Nation officials in Window Rock announced Kinsel’s death on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 2 Navy aviators are declared dead after a fighter jet crashed in Washington state
item.description: Two crew members who were missing following the crash of a fighter jet in mountainous terrain in Washington state during a routine training flight have been declared dead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Top 5 ways education would look different under Harris vs. Trump
item.description: Education issues have flown under the radar this election cycle despite both major candidates having big ideas about how the K-12 and college systems should work.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Kentucky AG investigating after man wakes up right before organ donation procedure
item.description: Kentucky's attorney general is looking into what the best possible action would be after an organ donation allegedly went terrible wrong nearly three years ago.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Popular Florida restaurant burns down on day it reopened after hurricane
item.description: A popular restaurant in Cape Coral burned down on the same day it had reopened after Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, KRON4

item.title: Juan Soto's 3-run homer in 10th sends Yankees past Guardians 5-2 and into World Series for 41st time
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Juan Soto was supposed to be the difference-maker, the one who pushed the New York Yankees back to the top. They're one step away.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Liam Payne fans pay tribute after singer's tragic death
item.description: Days after former One Direction singer, Liam Payne, died at age 31 while in Argentina, fans all over the world are paying tribute at his vigil in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Learning about God from dogs, Orthodox monks breed and train canines in upstate New York monastery
item.description: CAMBRIDGE, New York (AP) — After he and his fellow monks sang morning prayers in their church nestled in a forest, Brother Luke walked back to his residence to be greeted by a different kind of choir.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bath & Body Works apologizes for candle designed with what looked like KKK hoods
item.description: Bath & Body Works apologized for selling a winter-themed candle that came under scrutiny for label imagery that drew comparisons to Ku Klux Klan hoods, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KTLA 5

item.title: Singer named as victim in couple's alleged Las Vegas theft spree
item.description: A married couple allegedly stole hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of valuables as Las Vegas hosted the Super Bowl -- with one theft involving a popular singer, according to documents the 8 News Now Investigators obtained.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation

item.title: California woman slashed dog's throat, left it alive in trash: Sacramento deputies
item.description: The woman "felt her life would be easier if she only had to care for one dog and cut one of the dog’s throats," say officials.
item.dc:creator: Veronica Catlin, ABC 4

item.title: WWE legends Undertaker and Kane endorse Donald Trump for President in TikTok video
item.description: (KRON) -- In a video posted Friday on Donald Trump’s official TikTok account, titled "America Depends on It," legendary wrestlers The Undertaker and Kane throw their support behind Trump for President, calling out his Election Day opponent with a wrestling challenge.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, KRON4

item.title: Haddonfield, Illinois: How the iconic small town of horror in the 'Halloween' franchise came to be
item.description: Haddonfield, Illinois, a fictional small town, is the setting for John Carpenter's iconic horror film "Halloween," which has become a cultural phenomenon and has inspired numerous sequels and remakes.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, ABC 4

item.title: 2 people shown on camera leaving fatally shot teen at Las Vegas hospital
item.description: North Las Vegas police are asking for the public's help to identify two people they say were caught on camera leaving a fatally shot teen in a hospital lobby.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Overton, KRON4

item.title: Why experts say keeping standard time is 'undeniably' better for us
item.description: Surveys have found that most Americans want to do away with the twice-a-year changing of the clocks. But whether we should observe daylight saving or standard time year round will depend on who you ask.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Man's death originally reported as bear attack was actually 'vicious' murder, Montana sheriff says
item.description: A man's death that was previously reported as a bear attack is now being investigated by Montana authorities as a homicide. On Oct. 12, the body of 35-year-old Dustin Kjersem of Belgrade was discovered inside a tent in the wilderness north of Big Sky in Gallatin County.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Stanford psychologist behind the controversial "Stanford Prison Experiment" dies at 91
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Philip G. Zimbardo, the psychologist behind the controversial “Stanford Prison Experiment” that was intended to examine the psychological experiences of imprisonment, has died. He was 91. Stanford University announced Friday that Zimbardo died Oct.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Black male teachers are a rarity in preschools. This pioneering program wants to change that
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Before 19-year-old Davontez Johnson found himself in a preschool classroom at Dorothy I. Heights Elementary, he was a senior at a nearby high school who, like many students his age, was unsure of what he wanted to do with his life.
item.dc:creator: MORIAH BALINGIT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Crews halt fast-moving brush fire that burned 2 Oakland homes, forced 500 evacuations
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A fast-moving fire fed by strong winds burned two homes Friday and damaged several others in a hillside neighborhood in the city of Oakland, where hundreds of people were ordered to evacuate before more than 100 firefighters stopped the progress of the flames, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump microphone cuts out for 20 minutes at Detroit rally
item.description: Trump was in the midst of speaking about his tariff policy at the event on Friday, about to call it “the most beautiful word in the dictionary,” before the microphone went down. Someone handed the former president another microphone to try, but it didn’t work either.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, ABC 4

item.title: Missing teen kayaker found clinging to kayak off Waikiki
item.description: "I think he was in total shock because he wasn't emotional at all. I was actually crying my guts off because he was okay.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Napuunoa, WGN 9

item.title: 3 dead and 4 injured in collapse of Mississippi bridge being prepped for demolition
item.description: MENDENHALL, Miss. (AP) — Three people were killed and four were seriously injured Wednesday when a bridge in Mississippi that was closed nearly a month ago collapsed while a work crew was prepping it for demolition, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
